title: The raw data of Spatial muti-omics of glioma
author: Liu, Bohan
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Our files include the raw data from single-cell RNA sequencing, spatial transcriptomics sequencing, RNA  sequencing, and mass spectrometry analyses conducted in our study. Additionally, they contain clinical information for the patients involved in the single-cell RNA and spatial transcriptomics sequencing. These clinical data have been handled in compliance with privacy protection regulations to safeguard patient confidentiality. The raw data of the paper "Deciphering radial glial stem-like cells based on spatial multi-omics guides safe therapy in glioma".
